purpose: Defines all server-side named constants — directory paths resolved from the tracker root, polling/timing intervals tuned for fs.watch reliability, and shared default object shapes. `ROOT` is the Synapse repo root, computed as `path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..', '..')`. Subdirectories `DASHBOARDS_DIR`, `QUEUE_DIR`, `ARCHIVE_DIR`, `HISTORY_DIR`, `CONVERSATIONS_DIR` are all under ROOT. Timing constants control: `INIT_POLL_MS=100` (fs.watchFile poll for init/logs), `PROGRESS_RETRY_MS=80` (re-read after mid-write), `PROGRESS_READ_DELAY_MS=30` (initial debounce on progress change), `RECONCILE_DEBOUNCE_MS=300` (dashboards-dir change debounce), `RECONCILE_INTERVAL_MS=5000` (periodic full scan), `HEARTBEAT_MS=15000` (SSE keepalive), `DEPENDENCY_CHECK_DELAY_MS=100` (delay before dispatch readiness check after status change). `DEFAULT_INITIALIZATION` is the empty-dashboard shape `{task: null, agents: [], waves: [], chains: [], history: []}`; `DEFAULT_LOGS = {entries: []}`. PORT defaults to 3456 with env override.
gotchas: `ROOT` is computed via three-level `..` from `src/server/utils/` — moving this file to a different depth WILL break every directory constant silently.

`DEFAULT_INITIALIZATION` and `DEFAULT_LOGS` are SHARED object references — consumers MUST spread them (`{...DEFAULT_INITIALIZATION}`) before mutating, or they pollute the singleton (apiRoutes.js does this correctly).
Polling intervals are TUNED — `INIT_POLL_MS=100` is aggressive; raising it can cause UI lag, lowering risks fs.watchFile starvation.
`PORT=3456` is hard-coded as the dev default; any client (Electron preload, browser) connecting to `127.0.0.1:3456` will break if env override is used.
`MIME_TYPES` is exported but no longer referenced inside src/server/ — appears to be a vestige; check before removing.
patterns: All paths resolved at module load via `path.resolve` / `path.join` — never relative.
Timing constants suffixed with `_MS` (milliseconds), `_MS` for poll/debounce/retry distinguishes from raw counts.
Default-shape constants (`DEFAULT_*`) are minimal valid documents that pass schema validation in utils/json.js.
conventions: All directory exports are absolute paths (never relative).
Single source of truth — no other file should redeclare these values.

related: electron/services/* (have their own paths derived from app.getAppPath())
